source.body_text_sample:

Careers
Thanks for your interest in employment on the Springs Team!

Springs operates differently than many churches in that we distinguish very little difference between paid staff positions and volunteer positions. In fact, many of our volunteers are ministry leaders, but with unpaid positions. When we determine that a ministry role can only be filled by a paid staff person, we look to those people already plugged in and working on the Springs Team. This gives us a track record of the person already passionately labouring alongside us.

Please note: Springs keeps resumes on file for 3 months and while we appreciate your application, only those applicants that are being considered will be contacted.

To express an interest in working at Springs, please submit your resume along with a cover letter that clearly indicates your area of employment interest and specifically where you are currently volunteering at Springs to:

hr@springschurch.com or, mail to our mailing address

Springs Church
Attn: Human Resources
725 Lagimodiere Blvd.
Winnipeg, MB R2J 0T8
Canada
